citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: People learn by observation, by being told, by asking questions, by experimentation, by practice, and by making connections to past experience. Computers learn by applying specialized algorithms to large amounts of training data, or by thousands or even millions of trial and error experiences, to solve narrowly defined problems.
